identity.title: Days Drift By
identity.styleSentence: A liquid drum and bass track at a moderate tempo featuring shimmering guitar textures, evolving ambient pads, and melodic synth leads that create an immersive, rainforest-adjacent soundscape.

lyrics.text:
[Intro]

Morning light...
Take me there...
Take me there...

(instrumental)

[Verse 1]

Leaves above, the river below
Every little heartbeat moving slow
Hands in the breeze
Nothing to chase
Time disappears without a trace

[Pre-Chorus]

Hold me
Don't let go
Where we wander
Flowers grow

[Chorus]

Days drift by
We don't have to know why
Breathe tonight
Everything feels alive

Days drift by
Floating into the sky
Stay with me
Stay with me
Stay...

(Liquid DnB instrumental with melodic lead and guitar textures)

[Verse 2]

Clouds roll in
Then fade away
Every color melts into gray
Then the sun
Finds its way
Just like it always does

[Bridge]

Closer...
Closer...
Into the light...

Higher...
Higher...
Through the leaves...

(Long instrumental featuring evolving pads, liquid breaks, melodic synth lead, and shimmering guitar)

[Final Chorus]

Days drift by
We don't have to know why
Breathe tonight
Everything feels alive

Days drift by
Floating into the sky
Stay with me
Stay with me

Days drift by...
Days drift by...
Days drift by...

(Fade into rainforest ambience and distant vocal echoes.)

analysis.summary: The song captures a melancholic yet ethereal journey through time where moments dissolve like mist over a river, blending gritty noir aesthetics with dreamy liberation from reality.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A leaf floating on a dark river under moonlight, slow motion water ripples reflecting distorted city lights.
Black and white film grain overlaying colorful clouds dissolving into monochrome mist over a foggy dockside street.
Close-up of chest rising against the night sky, soft glowing particles floating in air like dust motes in sunlight.
Flowers blooming rapidly on a cracked concrete rooftop with vibrant green stems contrasting against gritty urban background.
A silhouette of an old steamboat drifting into thick fog until it becomes indistinguishable from the surrounding mist.
Beams of golden sunlight piercing through heavy storm clouds illuminating a dusty room filled with floating dust particles.
